overall.description: A cinematic night flight through a dense futuristic city canyon in a video game, likely Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves smoothly between towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows, briefly tilting up to reveal a full moon and falling debris before continuing forward through the urban landscape.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the night sky and full moon
debris or an object falls from above past the camera

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the narrow canyon between skyscrapers while tilting upward to observe the sky

entered.detail: tall building with horizontal rows of illuminated yellow windows
dark towering building with sparse vertical lighting strips
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings visible through the canyon gap
dark object falling from the sky past the camera
bright full moon visible in the night sky between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth drone flight through a narrow canyon between two massive skyscrapers in a futuristic city at night. Around the 7-second mark, the camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon overhead, while a piece of debris falls past the frame. The buildings on either side recede to the bottom of the frame as the view shifts skyward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view between downtown skyscrapers

events.description: camera begins tilting back down from the sky view toward the forward direction

agents.ego_description: maintaining forward motion while tilting the camera view down from the moon back toward the city canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera holds an upward angle showing the full moon between the towering buildings, then gradually tilts back down toward the original forward-facing view. The falling debris exits the frame, and the side buildings rise from the bottom of the frame back to their mid-ground positions as the drone continues its forward flight.

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady forward flight through the city canyon between the illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings visible through the canyon gap

segments.scene_description: The final segment maintains a stable forward-facing view as the drone continues through the urban canyon. The glass tower and dark skyscraper draw closer on either side, filling more of the frame, while the distant city lights remain visible ahead through the narrowing gap between buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight through a narrow futuristic city canyon that briefly pivots toward the night sky before returning to its forward trajectory. It begins with a smooth glide between two massive skyscrapers, where the camera suddenly tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon and a piece of falling debris as the buildings recede toward the bottom of the frame. As the debris exits the view, the camera gradually tilts back down, bringing the towering structures back into the mid-ground. The scene then stabilizes into a steady forward motion, drawing closer to a glass tower and a dark skyscraper that increasingly flank the frame. Finally, the drone continues its path through the urban gap, with distant city lights remaining visible ahead through the narrowing corridor of steel and glass.
